<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class SsmlPhoneme extends TwiML { /** * SsmlPhoneme constructor. * * @param string $words Words to speak * @param array $attributes Optional attributes */ public function __construct($words, $attributes = []) { parent::__construct('phoneme', $words, $attributes); } /** * Add Alphabet attribute. * * @param string $alphabet Specify the phonetic alphabet */ public function setAlphabet($alphabet): self { return $this->setAttribute('alphabet', $alphabet); } /** * Add Ph attribute. * * @param string $ph Specifiy the phonetic symbols for pronunciation */ public function setPh($ph): self { return $this->setAttribute('ph', $ph); } }
